allow: Bash(python -c "import yaml, sys; yaml.safe_load\(open\(sys.argv[1], encoding=''utf-8''\)\)" "/c/Projects/EV smart charging/.claude/worktrees/friendly-napier/packages/ev_ui_sensors.yaml")
